title: Limit who can change/update a status to only a person listed in a people column

posts.author: JWatson (Joshua Watson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have the following configuration in a board:

Approver 1 (people column); Approval 1 Status (status column)

I am trying to create an approval process that only allows the person identified in Approver 1 to change the Approval 1 status column to “approved” or “denied”. Is there such an automation? Can explain further if more details are needed.

posts.author: Megan345 (Megan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Joshua,

It depends how you want the approver or other board users to interact with other columns, but a combination of editing the board permissions and restricting columns to particular users may work for you?
